name: 30 days to love
description:
♡ 30 days to love ♡

Welcome to 30 days to love. 30 days to love is an interactive 30 day dating experiment simulation in which 6 young men and 6 women gather for a month during summer to find a potential relationship.

➹ HOW TO PLAY

Challenges or events will be opened through a messenger at certain times throughout the 30 day period controlled by your host. Participants can gain information they would like to know by conversing with each other anonymously in chat rooms opened at specific time windows under their selected usernames. You will then choose which person under their username suits your interest, and are able to chat with them, as well as whoever chooses you, but you may not know who they are.

The final selection will take place on the last day. If the feeling is mutual between both parties, you shall date the participant.


░ RULES

You may only converse if a chatroom is opened between you both via host. You cannot profess feelings before the trial is over.

All participants MUST be over the age of 18 to participate. (Fictional)
creator: Xolumie
